title: palicourea ceronii
intro: Palicourea ceronii, also known as the Cerón's palicourea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea ceronii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having potential anti-cancer and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
